tag.name: cHTML - TikTok - Add Payment Info - begin_checkout

parameter.value:
<script>
if('{{user_data.sha256_email_address}}' !== 'null' ){
  ttq_IdoMods.instance('{{ID - TikTok}}').identify({
    email: {{user_data.sha256_email_address}},
    phone_number: {{user_data.sha256_phone_number}}
  })
}
  
  var array_ready_objects=[];
  var array_value_objects={{dlv - eventModel.items[]}}

  for(var i=0;i<array_value_objects.length;i++){
    var contents_format = {}
    contents_format.content_type="product_group"
    contents_format.content_id=array_value_objects[i].item_id
    contents_format.content_category=array_value_objects[i].item_category
    contents_format.content_name=array_value_objects[i].item_name
    contents_format.quantity=array_value_objects[i].quantity
    contents_format.price=array_value_objects[i].price
    array_ready_objects.push(contents_format)
  }

  ttq_IdoMods.instance('{{ID - TikTok}}').track('AddPaymentInfo', {
    value: {{dlv - eventModel.value}},
    currency: "{{dlv - eventModel.currency}}",
    contents: array_ready_objects
  })
</script>
false
